title: polygala peduncularis
intro: Polygala peduncularis, also known as Chinese senega or polygala root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. It is a perennial herb native to China and other parts of Asia, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The polygala root has anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, polygala root is often dried and used as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosages.
